name: Heart attack
summary: Blocked blood vessel to the heart muscle. Chest pain is the classic sign.

steps: Call 999. Ask if anyone qualified is around to help.
Get them into a half-sitting position with back supported (against a wall or your own body).
Ask if they have any medication and help them take it if needed.
If no medication but you have aspirin and they're not allergic — give a single 300 mg tablet to chew slowly.
If not breathing normally — start CPR.

warnings.text: Always check for aspirin allergy before offering it.
